display.purpose: Page H1s and section heroes. Always Bebas Neue, always uppercase, always alone at the top of the visual hierarchy.

headline.purpose: Card titles in featured grids, case study titles, major section subheadings.

title.purpose: Card titles in dense grids, secondary headings within sections.

body.purpose: All prose content. Max container ~520px (~65ch). Reads as technical documentation, not marketing.

label.purpose: All metadata, IDs, tags, section page numbers, status chips. Minimum size 10px. The .sys-label utility.

shadows.name: state-hover
shadows.purpose: Cards and containers on hover. Confirms interactivity. Not used at rest.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Elements that genuinely float: nav overlay, glass containers.

shadows.name: cursor-preview
shadows.purpose: The 400px cursor-following thumbnail panel in CaseFiles.

shadows.name: glass-ambient
shadows.purpose: The .glass utility. About quote card, Contact right panel.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Enter transitions — elements appearing, expanding, revealing. Snappy start, smooth land.

motion.name: ease-in
motion.purpose: Exit transitions — elements leaving, collapsing, hiding. Fast out.

motion.name: ease-sweep
motion.purpose: Wipe / sweep transitions: red photo reveal, menu overlay sweep.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro feedback: color transitions, opacity changes.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Standard UI transitions: hover states, border shifts.

motion.name: duration-enter
motion.purpose: CaseCard clip-path enter. The canonical enter duration for interactive reveals.

motion.name: duration-exit
motion.purpose: CaseCard clip-path exit. Always shorter than enter (asymmetric timing rule).

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.note: Mobile/tablet boundary. Layout switches to single-column.

components.name: Button — Solid
components.description: Primary CTA. Signal red fill, near-black text, 8px chamfer polygon. SweepFill on hover, arrow nudge 3px, scale 0.97 on press.
components.css: .ds-btn-solid { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; background: #ff2540; color: #0a0a0a; border: none; padding: 16px 32px; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 8px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 8px)); transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-solid:hover { background: #cc1f34; } .ds-btn-solid:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff2540; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-solid:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Button — Accent Ghost
components.description: Default variant. Transparent background, signal-red border and text. Hover sweeps to solid red fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent-ghost { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: #ff2540; border: 1px solid #ff2540; padding: 13px 24px; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 8px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 8px)); transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-accent-ghost:hover { background: #ff2540; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-btn-accent-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff2540; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-accent-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Button — Ghost
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent background, rule-line border. Hover lightens border and tints background.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: rgba(245,245,243,0.62); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.11); padding: 13px 24px; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 8px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 8px)); transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); color: #f5f5f3; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff2540; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Section Tag
components.description: Red chamfer-clipped section identifier chip. Followed by mono page number. Used at the start of each major section.
components.css: .ds-section-tag-wrap { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-section-tag { background: #ff2540; color: #0a0a0a; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 8px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 8px)); padding: 3px 10px 2px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.6; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-section-tag-num { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: rgba(245,245,243,0.45); }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Rectangular filter toggle. Inactive: rule-line border, muted text. Active: signal-red border + dim fill + signal-red text.
components.css: .ds-filter-group { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .ds-filter-pill { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.11); color: rgba(245,245,243,0.45); background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-filter-pill:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); color: rgba(245,245,243,0.75); } .ds-filter-pill--active { border-color: #ff2540; color: #ff2540; background: rgba(255,37,64,0.05); } .ds-filter-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff2540; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Editorial Row
components.description: The anti-card. Horizontal project/note row. Hover reveals red left accent bar (scaleY), title brightens, index turns full red. Used in CaseFiles, FieldNotes, WhatIDo.
components.html:
01

Orcs Must Die: By the Blade

UX/UI Designer·2024
→
components.css: .ds-editorial-row { position: relative; } .ds-editorial-row::before { content: ''; display: block; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.11); transition: background 0.3s; } .ds-editorial-row:hover::before { background: rgba(255,37,64,0.45); } .ds-editorial-row__accent { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 2px; background: #ff2540; opacity: 0; transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: top; transition: opacity 0.25s, transform 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-editorial-row:hover .ds-editorial-row__accent { opacity: 1; transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-editorial-row__link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; padding: 24px 16px 24px 24px; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-editorial-row:hover .ds-editorial-row__link { background: rgba(255,37,64,0.018); } .ds-editorial-row__index { flex-shrink: 0; width: 40px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(255,37,64,0.3); transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-editorial-row:hover .ds-editorial-row__index { color: #ff2540; } .ds-editorial-row__content { flex-grow: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-editorial-row__title { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3.2vw, 3rem); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.01em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(240,238,234,0.75); transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-editorial-row:hover .ds-editorial-row__title { color: #f5f5f3; } .ds-editorial-row__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-top: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(245,245,243,0.45); } .ds-editorial-row__arrow { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 18px; color: #ff2540; opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-10px); transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-editorial-row:hover .ds-editorial-row__arrow { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }

components.name: System Label
components.description: The .sys-label utility. All metadata, IDs, read-time, category tags, divider labels. The visual voice of UI chrome.
components.css: .ds-sys-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(245,245,243,0.62); }

narrative.overview:
A calibrated instrument has no unnecessary controls. Every dial, gauge, and readout exists because someone needs it to make a decision. This system works the same way: surfaces that recede into near-black, type that reads cleanly under any screen, and a single red that fires only when something requires attention. Nothing is decorative by default.

The system is built for a professional audience running a quick diagnostic. A hiring manager scanning case studies in a lit office, evaluating whether this designer can solve the UX problems their studio has right now. The interface should accelerate that evaluation, not distract it.

The grid background, scan line, and chamfer polygon cuts are functional references to technical UX documentation and game-engine UI. They signal that the person who built this thinks in systems. The system reads as dark, technical, and deliberate — not hacker, not cyberpunk, not neon.
keyCharacteristics: Void-black surfaces with near-zero reflectance; no atmospheric glow or bloom
Two typefaces only: Bebas Neue for display, JetBrains Mono for everything else
Signal Red on ≤10% of any screen surface — status, active state, primary CTA only
All corners sharp (0px) or chamfer-cut (8px polygon clip); no circular border-radius on interactive elements
Elevation flat by default; shadows appear only as response to interaction or float state
Spacing varies by section rhythm: 112px major sections, 64px compact sections

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal Red appears on ≤10% of any given screen. The moment it stops being rare, it stops being a signal. If a new element wants red, an existing one loses it first.

rules.name: The Warm Tint Rule
rules.body: No neutral is fully achromatic. Every near-black is slightly warm (#0a0a0a, #080808), every near-white is parchment-tinted (#f5f5f3, #f0eeea). Pure #000000 and #ffffff are forbidden.

rules.name: The Transparency Rule
rules.body: Semi-transparent tokens (--color-rule, --color-fg-dim, --color-fg-mute) are contextual by design. Never convert them to opaque equivalents.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue and JetBrains Mono only. No system-ui fallback, no decorative third face, no weight variations outside 400/500/700.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Display Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue is always text-transform: uppercase. Mixed case breaks its character. If a display element needs mixed case, change the typographic level — not the case rule.

rules.name: The 10px Floor Rule
rules.body: No text element drops below 10px. Enforce with .sys-label and .micro-label utilities.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If an element is at rest and not floating above other content, it has no shadow. Resting shadows spend depth vocabulary without communicating a state change.

dos: Do use Signal Red only on elements that carry status or activation: CTAs, hover state transitions, status badges, focus rings, section identifiers.
Do use JetBrains Mono for all body copy, labels, metadata, and UI chrome. Bebas Neue for display headlines only.
Do apply the 8px chamfer polygon to all interactive button-shaped elements.
Do use editorial row patterns over card grids for ordered lists of work, notes, or services.
Do keep the grain overlay and scan line on every page.
Do vary section vertical spacing: 112px major, 64px compact, 24px horizontal baseline.
Do write interface copy in the PRODUCT.md voice: senior, specific, problems over aesthetics, no em dashes.
donts: Don't use Signal Red as ambient atmosphere (gradient fill, section tint, decorative glow).
Don't apply backdrop-filter: blur() to scrolling content containers.
Don't build identical card grids (icon + heading + text, same size, repeated).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text on a gradient fill).
Don't add neon glow, bloom effects, or atmospheric light halos.
Don't write 'passionate about,' 'innovative solutions,' 'seamless experience,' 'game-changing,' or 'revolutionary.'
Don't apply resting shadows to cards or containers at rest.
Don't introduce a second accent color.
Don't build SaaS-style metric hero blocks.
Don't use modals as first response to any interaction.
Don't produce designs that read as generic creative-agency portfolio, Dribbble shot dump, SaaS landing template, or game-studio player-facing site.
